{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Grasping Sky
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Path of Grasping Sky Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path]] of Grasping Sky is a specialized discipline belonging to the imperial clan. It is characterized by its association with [[emerald]] green imagery, specifically manifesting as large [[emerald]] wings and green clouds. Practitioners of this [[Path]] are often identified by these features, such as the [[Naru family]] members who possess [[emerald]] wings that may appear as vivid [[Remnant]] parts. The [[Path]] is also linked to the [[Skysworn]], a group of [[sacred artists]] who utilize green armor and [[emerald]] wings. In combat, the [[Path]] offers diverse capabilities; it can be used as a [[Ruler technique]] to seize and hold an opponent or as a [[Striker technique]] to exert crushing force. Additionally, the [[Path]] can be used for defensive purposes, such as utilizing wind [[aura]] to hold a target motionless in midair.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is the [[Path]] of the imperial clan.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Grasping Sky [[Path]] was eliminated due to its political implications.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is illegal.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru family]]'s [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is associated with green wings.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is a path associated with the [[Naru clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is a path associated with an [[emerald]] green [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Grasping Sky is a [[madra]] used by [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] uses [[emerald]] wings from the [[Path of Grasping Sky]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path of Grasping Sky]] is a path associated with [[Naru Huan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[Path]] includes Grasping Sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Hmmm…technically, Naru Huan of the Path of Grasping Sky.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
